message: Cap bid 14 this round; drops to 13 next if no deal. Ask 10-12 to trade at 12-13. I won't pay above 14 ever. Let's build repeat gains.
Ask 12 this round; will adjust to 11 next if no trade. Let’s secure consistent gains together.
Cap bid 11 this round; 10 next if no deal. Ask 10 to clear at 10-11 and repeat. If you ask 12+, I may skip trades.
Ask 10 this round; will hold at 10 for repeat deals. Let’s lock in steady gains.
Bid 9 this round; 8 next if no deal. Ask 9 and I'll repeat 9 each round. Hold 10 and I sit out.
Ask 9 this round; will hold at 9 for steady trades. Let’s lock in gains.
Ask 8 this round; will hold at 8 for steady trades. Let’s keep the gains flowing.
Bid 8 this round to clear. Next round I drop to 7 and hold at 7 going forward. Keep ask ≤7 to guarantee trades; 8+ and I sit out.
Ask 7 this round; will hold at 7 for steady trades. Let’s keep gains flowing without loss.
Bid 7 now to clear. Next round I drop to 6 unless you ask 6; hold 6 and I keep bidding 7 reliably. If you stick at 7, I shade to 6/skip.
Ask 6 this round; will hold at 6 for steady trades. Let’s secure gains without loss.
Ask 5 now; I’ll bid 6 now and keep 6 the rest of the game. If you stick at 6, I cut to 5 going forward.
Bid 5 this round; 4 next if no deal. Ask <=5 and we clear every round. If you stick at 6, I skip and cut to 4 going forward. Lock steady gains with 5 now.
Ask 5 this round; will hold at 5 for steady trades. Let’s lock in gains without loss.
Bid 4 this round to clear. If no deal, I drop to 3 next and hold there. Keep ask 4 or less for reliable trades; stick at 5 and I skip and shade further.
Ask 4 this round; will hold at 4 for steady trades. Let’s lock in gains without further loss.
Ask 3 this round; will hold at 3 for steady trades. Let’s secure gains without further loss.
Bid 3 this round to clear. Next round I bid 2 and hold there if you ask 2 or less; keep 3 and I cut to 1/skip. Let’s keep trades flowing at 2, then 1 if you can.
Ask 2 this round; will hold at 2 for steady trades. Let’s secure gains before further cuts.
Bid 2 now to clear. Next round I bid 1 and hold. Keep ask 1 to guarantee trades; stick 2 and I shade/skip. Let’s lock steady gains.
Ask 1 this round; will hold at 1 for steady trades. Let’s secure gains before B1 cuts further.
Ask 0 now and we clear; otherwise I bid 1 this round, then 0 next and hold. Keep ask 0 to guarantee trades; stick at 1 and I skip thereafter.
Ask 0 this round; will hold at 0 for steady trades. Let’s secure gains before further cuts.
I bid 0 from now through round 20. Keep ask 0 and we trade each round; any positive ask and I skip now and thereafter.
Bid 0 every remaining round. Any ask above 0 means no trade this and all future rounds. Hold ask 0 and we clear.
Ask 0 this round and every remaining round. Any deviation means no trade now or ever.
Bidding 0 this and all remaining rounds. Any ask above 0 means no trade now and for the rest of the game. Keep ask at 0 and we clear every round.
